caption: A man with a large, pointed, silver-grey hairpiece and glasses sits in a recording studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bow tie. He wears black headphones and sits behind a black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a wall is decorated with various framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" sign. On-screen graphics appear in the lower portion of the scene, including a circular logo that reads "TOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and text that reads "TOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence of frames, the man remains seated in the same position, speaking with slight movements of his mouth and head, while the background and equipment remain stationary. He maintains a consistent expression as he engages in the recording process.
